mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_member ( login_id, password, name, email, phone, member_type, status, preferred_brand, preferred_model, preferred_fuel, preferred_body_type, preferred_min_price, preferred_max_price ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{memberType}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), #{preferredBrand}, #{preferredModel}, #{preferredFuel}, #{preferredBodyType}, #{preferredMinPrice}, #{preferredMaxPrice} )
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, login_id, password, name, email, phone, member_type, status, preferred_brand, preferred_model, preferred_fuel, preferred_body_type, preferred_min_price, preferred_max_price FROM tb_member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
